g.text: Plugin source repos (each a separate GitHub repo)
Mechanical sync (subtree / generator / pinned package). Mechanism TBD; the existence of shared content survives the multi-repo decision.
LiveSpec Core is one peer among N plugins.
It's not privileged in the marketplace structure;
it governs the SPECIFICATION/ surface and publishes
the contract that every implementation plugin honors.
Persistent Agent Knowledge is one of the three
may use a long-lived memory store.
